title: Login Authentication Error
description: Customer cannot log in due to incorrect OTP verification issue.

title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Payment process stops during checkout and shows timeout error.

title: Profile Update Not Saving
description: User changes profile information but it does not update.

title: Order Not Showing in Dashboard
description: Customer placed order but cannot see it in order history.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer requested password reset but email not delivered.

title: App Crashes on Startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launching.

title: Invoice Download Failed
description: Invoice PDF does not download from billing section.

title: Wrong Product Delivered
description: Customer received incorrect product from recent order.

title: Coupon Code Not Applying
description: Discount coupon shows invalid during checkout.

title: Slow Website Loading
description: Website takes too long to load on mobile devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Refund request approved but amount not returned yet.

title: Account Suspended Without Notice
description: Customer account suspended without any prior warning.

title: Notification Not Working
description: Push notifications are not appearing on Android device.

title: Shipping Address Not Updating
description: User unable to change shipping address before checkout.

title: Live Chat Support Not Responding
description: Customer waiting for response in live chat for over 30 minutes.
